title: Brand Liquid Sizzle
description: A premium brand opener with a deterministic WebGL liquid field, depth-shifted type, light streaks, grain, and a logo sting.

source.name: iPolloWork · HyperFrames
source.attribution: Original iPolloWork composition inspired by HyperFrames Liquid Glass, shader transition, grain, and logo outro patterns.

applyChecklist: Replace the descriptor, keyword, and call to action with brand-specific copy.
Keep WebGL effects atmospheric and preserve contrast for the primary title.
Use the local CSS fallback if the preview environment cannot create a WebGL context.
Verify the final logo sting and grain remain crisp after H.264 encoding.
